prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 北京科技大学在新疆理科最低录取位次2023年约3145名，2024年前移至约2662名（前移约483名），2025年小幅后移至约2749名（后移约87名）。近三年位次在26 62-3145之间波动，2025年基准位次约2749名，整体呈前移后小幅回调态势；该校在新疆理科招生计划2023年66人、2024年66人、2025年67人，2026年计划缩减至56人，较2025年减少11人，降幅约16.4%。招生计划明显缩减，考生竞争压力有所缓解，有利于位次前移（数字减小）。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京科技大学是211工程、 双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2021年第33名、2022年第36名、2023-2026年稳定在第35名，属于国内顶尖211高校，办学层次和综合实力稳定；2026年学校 声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及学术不端事件（国家卫健委通报伪造成绩单和抄袭学位论文），可能对报考心理产生轻微负面影响。抖音热度极高，总排名第1（综合热度1423.8万 ），远超清华北大，短视频平台曝光量大，关注度高，可能吸引更多考生关注报考。投档异常记录中未见北京科技大学相关信号，说明该校在新疆未出现明显断档或暴跌；冶金工程A+、材料科学与工程A+、科学技术史A+、环境科学与工程A-，共4个A-及以上学科。材料科学与工程、冶金工程等王牌学科与该校在新疆招生的材料类、工科 试验班等专业高度关联，对相关专业报考有正向吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业社会热度持续高热，北京科技大学在新疆理科招生 中包含计算机类、人工智能、通信工程、自动化类等热门专业，有利于维持报考热度。新疆2026年普通高考总人数约23.8万人（数据标注不确定），较2025年分科合计约7.65万人 有大幅增长预期，考生基数扩大将加剧整体竞争。；北京科技大学位于北京市，属于一线城市高校，对新疆考生有较强地域 吸引力。该校在新疆理科招生计划占比较小（约56人），属于跨省招生，地域偏好因素对位次影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合招生计划缩减16.4%（利于位次前移）、抖音高热 关注度（推高竞争）、考生规模扩大预期（加剧竞争）、声誉偏负面（轻微抑制）等多因素，结合抖音高热带来的关注度提升和考生规模 扩大效应，小幅上调修正量至+30。预测2026年最低录取位次约2508名，较2025年2749名前移约241名。波动区间2132-2884名，覆盖历史波动范围及预测不确定度。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum admission ranking for University of Science and Technology Beijing in Xinjiang Science was approximately 3145 in 2023, moving forward to about 2662 in 2024 (forward by about 483), and slightly moving back to about 2749 in 2025 (backward by about 87). The rankings fluctuated between 2662 and 3145 in the past three years, with a baseline ranking of about 2749 in 2025, showing an overall trend of moving forward followed by a slight correction. The enrollment plan for this university in Xinjiang Science was 66 in 2023, 66 in 2024, 67 in 2025, and is planned to be reduced to 56 in 2026, a decrease of 11 from 2025, a drop of about 16.4%. The significant reduction in enrollment plan eases competition pressure for candidates, favoring a forward shift in ranking (decrease in number).

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: University of Science and Technology Beijing is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. Its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings was 33rd in 2021, 36th in 2022, and stable at 35th from 2023 to 2026, indicating a stable level and comprehensive strength among top 211 universities. In 2026, the university's reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving academic misconduct incidents (forged transcripts and plagiarized theses reported by the National Health Commission), which may have a slight negative impact on application psychology. It has extremely high popularity on Douyin, ranking first overall (comprehensive popularity of 14.238 million), far exceeding Tsinghua and Peking University, with high exposure on short video platforms and high attention, potentially attracting more candidates to apply. No abnormal signals in the submission records for University of Science and Technology Beijing were found, indicating no significant gaps or crashes in Xinjiang. It has A+ in Metallurgical Engineering, A+ in Materials Science and Engineering, A+ in History of Science and Technology, and A- in Environmental Science and Engineering, totaling 4 disciplines at A- or above. Flagship disciplines like Materials Science and Engineering and Metallurgical Engineering are highly correlated with majors such as Materials and Engineering Experimental Class recruited in Xinjiang Science, providing positive attraction for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to have high social popularity. University of Science and Technology Beijing's recruitment in Xinjiang Science includes popular majors like Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, Communication Engineering, and Automation, helping maintain application enthusiasm. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Xinjiang Gaokao is about 238,000 (data marked as uncertain), a significant expected increase from the approximately 76,500 total by subject in 2025, which will intensify overall competition. University of Science and Technology Beijing is located in Beijing, a first-tier city, which has a strong regional attraction for Xinjiang candidates. The enrollment plan for this university in Xinjiang Science is relatively small (about 56 people), and as a cross-provincial recruitment, the impact of regional preference on rankings is limited.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as a 16.4% reduction in enrollment plan (favoring forward ranking shift), high Douyin popularity (increasing competition), expected increase in candidate pool (intensifying competition), and slightly negative reputation (mild suppression), combined with the attention boost from high Douyin popularity and the expansion of the candidate pool, the adjustment is slightly increased to +30. The predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is about 2508, moving forward by about 241 from 2749 in 2025. The fluctuation range is 2132-2884, covering historical fluctuation range and prediction uncertainty.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is about 2508, with a range of 2132-2884. Candidates with rankings below the lower limit of 2132 are advised to focus on Tier 1 majors (Science Experimental Class, Artificial Intelligence, Computer Science). Candidates around ranking 2508 should mainly target Tier 2 majors (Automation, Engineering Experimental Class, Mathematics), while also attempting Tier 1. Candidates near the upper limit of 2884 should use Tier 3 majors as safety (Materials, Energy and Power Engineering, Safety Engineering), while also striving for Tier 2 majors. Note that although Materials Science and Engineering has an A+ discipline evaluation, it belongs to the broader category of biology, chemistry, environment, and materials, with relatively low social popularity, so it may offer good value.
